stories: Geopolitics shock absorber: U.S.–Iran deal signals Strait of Hormuz reopening; oil tail-risk premium unwinds
Tape check into the close: indexes push higher, but breadth stays narrow (mega-caps lead; equal-weight lags)
Fed week takes center stage: traders now price policy-path risk, not war risk
Global central-bank and macro calendar widens: BOE hold expected; BOJ signals + China credit in focus
Real-rate pulse: 5-year TIPS yield is the key cross-asset input into the meeting
Gold refuses to “risk-off fade”: spot still cited near ~$4,348/oz
Rotation watch: bank-stock momentum building even as tech dominates the index
Actionable flow: DASH $155 puts — 1,000 contracts, Jul 17, 2026 expiry; “bullish” tag on a put print (~$510k premium)
Positioning tells you the volatility regime: SPX dealer snapshot flags negative-gamma conditions into event risk
Crypto: bitcoin “treasury” model faces an earnings-cycle reality check; BTC downside path chatter is now being validated by major outlets
